ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the trade was executed */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the traded stock */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the broker executing the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was traded */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stock traded */,
  "buy_sell" TEXT /* Indicates whether the trade was a buy (B) or a sell (S) */,
  "execution_type" TEXT /* Type of execution (e.g., D for direct, NI for negotiated) */,
  "market_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the market during the trade (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the stock exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* Total value of the trade (price * quantity) */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "trade_reference" TEXT /* Reference or order ID for the trade */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the trader who executed the trade */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the trade (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_market_condition FOREIGN KEY ("market_condition") REFERENCES market_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_execution_type FOREIGN KEY ("execution_type") REFERENCES execution_types ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stock information was updated */,
  "is_listed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the stock is currently listed */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "broker_name" TEXT /* Name of the broker or brokerage firm */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the broker */,
  "broker_type" TEXT /* Type of broker (e.g., retail, institutional) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the broker */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the broker */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the broker */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the broker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the market condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market condition */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the market condition started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the market condition ended */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the market condition (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "execution_types" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution type */,
  "execution_type" TEXT /* Type of execution (e.g., D for direct, NI for negotiated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the execution type */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the execution type */,
  "latency" REAL /* Typical latency for this execution type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the status (e.g., green for completed, red for pending) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., trading, analysis) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the company */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., profitable, loss) */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_analysis_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the trading activities */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the report (e.g., 1 day, 1 week) */,
  "graph_data" TEXT /* Data for generating graphs and charts */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
